title: polystichum perelegans
intro:
Polystichum perelegans, commonly known as the elegant male fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The therapeutic actions of Polystichum perelegans are attributed to its bioactive constituents, such as folic acid, and other compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
